name: Cashmere Valley Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank serving Central Washington since 1932, offering personal and business banking with competitive rates on savings, checking, CDs, and mortgages.
description_long:
Cashmere Valley Bank is a regional community bank that has operated in Central Washington since 1932, building relationships across Chelan, Douglas, Kittitas, and Yakima counties. The bank positions itself as a locally-focused alternative to larger national institutions, emphasizing personal relationships and community investment alongside standard banking services.

The bank offers a full suite of personal banking products including checking and savings accounts, high-yield certificates of deposit (CDs), credit cards, and mortgage loans. For business customers, they provide business checking and savings accounts, merchant processing, and treasury management services. Current promotional rates include a 25-month CD at 3.03% APY and an 11-month CD special at 4.00% APY, with flexible CD terms ranging from 3 months to 7 years. They also offer investment checking products and personal loan options.

Cashmere Valley Bank differentiates itself through active community engagement, sponsoring numerous local events (Bankers on Burros, Cinco de Mayo, customer appreciation activities, county fairs, and habitat for humanity projects). They were voted 2025 Best Bank in their service area. The bank provides mobile banking with a 4.8-star rated app (3.1K ratings) and emphasizes accessibility features. Their branding emphasizes being "the little bank with the BIG circle of friends" and positions community involvement as core to their mission.

As a regional community bank, Cashmere Valley Bank is best suited for customers seeking personalized service and local investment in their region. However, customers should verify that branch locations, service hours, and product availability match their needs, as their geographic footprint is limited to Central Washington counties. Competitive rate offerings appear comparable to other regional banks, though rates should be compared directly with national alternatives. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: High-yield certificates of deposit (3 months to 7 years)
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Competitive CD rates with current 25-month special at 3.03% APY and 11-month special at 4.00% APY
Flexible CD terms from 3 months to 7 years
Mobile banking app rated 4.8 stars with 3,100+ customer ratings
Active community involvement with sponsorships and volunteer programs across four counties
Investment checking products available with competitive APY rates
Voted 2025 Best Bank in all service counties
Online banking, debit card rewards program, and merchant processing services for businesses
cons: Geographic coverage limited to four Central Washington counties only
Website does not display current loan rates or mortgage terms for comparison
Minimum opening deposits required ($100 for CDs, $250,000 minimum for higher investment checking APY rates)
Limited information about overdraft policies and fee structures on public website
best_for: Central Washington residents seeking personalized community bank service
Small business owners in Chelan, Douglas, Kittitas, or Yakima counties
Savers looking for competitive CD rates with flexible terms
Customers prioritizing local bank community investment and engagement
diagnosis: Cashmere Valley Bank is ideal for Central Washington residents and small business owners seeking a community-focused alternative to national banks with competitive deposit rates and active local involvement. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—this bank only serves four counties in Central Washington, making it unsuitable for customers outside this region or those requiring multi-state banking presence.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: FDIC-insured community bank serving Central Washington since 1932 with personal and business banking services.
